ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the song was released */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the song */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the song */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the song */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song contains explicit content */,
  "is_released" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is currently released and available */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the song (e.g., remix, live performance) */,
  "lyrics_url" TEXT /* URL to the lyrics of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the album the song belongs to */,
  "is_single" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song is a single */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the producer of the song */,
  "song_url" TEXT /* URL to the song file */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the cover art of the song */,
  "copyright" TEXT /* Copyright information for the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary genre of the artist */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the artist */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's profile picture */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the artist */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON string containing links to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* URL to the artist's official website */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the artist is currently active */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the artist's last activity (e.g., new release, concert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_artists" (
  "song_artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song-artist relationship */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the artist in the song (e.g., main artist, featured artist) */,
  "contribution_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the artist's contribution to the song */,
  "is_main_artist" INTEGER /* Indicates if the artist is the main artist of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_artists_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_artists_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre */,
  "is_subgenre" INTEGER /* Indicates if the genre is a subgenre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the language */,
  "is_official" INTEGER /* Indicates if the language is an official language of the country */,
  "native_name" TEXT /* Name of the language in its native script */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "flag_url" TEXT /* URL to the flag of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "streaming_data" (
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each streaming event */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the streaming data */,
  "streams" INTEGER /* Number of streams for the song on that date */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the song on that date */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data is recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who streamed the song */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for streaming (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the stream was from a paid account */,
  "is_live" INTEGER /* Indicates if the stream was a live performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stream_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_data_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_streaming_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., artist, label, admin) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's country */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is verified */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the song was added to favorites */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the favorite is public or private */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User's notes or comments about the favorite song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was last updated */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is public or private */,
  "privacy_level" TEXT /* Privacy level of the playlist (e.g., public, private, unlisted) */,
  "is_collaborative" INTEGER /* Indicates if the playlist is collaborative */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* JSON string containing IDs of users who can collaborate on the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist-song relationship */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the song was added to the playlist */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the song in the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_songs_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)
